display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Condensed, uppercase-only, stamped authority.

body.purpose: Subheadlines, descriptive text, navigation. Geometric, cool, precise.

label.purpose: Footer metadata, pill labels, bottom-bar. Uppercase, tight tracking.

shadows.name: beacon-glow
shadows.purpose: CTA button on hover only. Reinforces Cargo Gold as a navigation beacon.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: All entrance animations (fadeDown, fadeUp, expand). Fast deceleration.

motion.name: route-dash
motion.purpose: SVG route path animation. Simulates cargo in transit.

motion.name: port-pulse
motion.purpose: Port marker dots — breathing rhythm of active ports.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: CTA action. Sharp, gold-stamped. The only warm surface on the page.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #E8A020; color: #081629; font-family: 'Bebas Neue', sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; letter-spacing: 0.12em; padding: 0.8rem 1.8rem; border: none; border-radius: 2px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #f5b540; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 4px 24px rgba(232,160,32,0.15); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8A020; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Email Input
components.description: Notify-me form input. Subtle dark fill, Cargo Gold focus state.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="email" placeholder="Enter your email for updates" />
components.css: .ds-input { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: #F0F4FF; font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; letter-spacing: 0.04em; padding: 0.8rem 1.2rem; border-radius: 2px; width: 260px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.25s, background 0.25s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6B8BAD; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #E8A020; background: rgba(232,160,32,0.06); }

components.name: Service Pill
components.description: Taxonomy tag for service types. Informational only — no hover state.
components.css: .ds-pill { font-family: 'Barlow', sans-serif; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6B8BAD; padding: 0.45rem 1rem; border: 1px solid rgba(107,139,173,0.25); border-radius: 100px; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Route Animation
components.description: Signature SVG component. Animated shipping routes + pulsing port markers.
components.html: <svg class="ds-routes" viewBox="0 0 1440 900" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path class="ds-route-path" d="M-40,600 Q360,100 720,300 Q1080,500 1480,200"/><circle class="ds-dot" cx="180" cy="590" r="3"/><circle class="ds-dot" cx="720" cy="310" r="3"/></svg>
components.css: .ds-routes { position: fixed; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.18; } .ds-route-path { fill: none; stroke: #E8A020; stroke-width: 1; stroke-dasharray: 6 10; animation: ds-dash 6s linear infinite; } @keyframes ds-dash { to { stroke-dashoffset: -80; } } .ds-dot { fill: #E8A020; animation: ds-pulse 3s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; } 50% { opacity: 1; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-route-path, .ds-dot { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview:
BRLOGS connects worlds. The design embodies that ambition physically: deep ocean-midnight backgrounds that evoke the open sea between origin and destination, a Cargo Gold accent that reads like a navigation beacon cutting through night water, and Bebas Neue headlines that feel stamped on a shipping manifest — compressed, unapologetic, built for scale. Every element communicates movement. The animated route lines crossing the hero are not decoration; they are the product.

This is not a startup. It is not a platform. It is a freight forwarder with corridor knowledge encoded in its confidence. SMB importers and exporters — operators who move cargo across borders every week — need to see authority instantly. This system earns that read in under two seconds.

The system rejects three things by name: generic logistics clipart, startup-pastel SaaS aesthetics, and heavy corporate portal design.
keyCharacteristics: Dark-committed: navy-deep covers 80%+ of the surface; no light-mode hedging
Typographically bold: Bebas Neue display paired with Barlow body for industrial precision
Accent economy: Cargo Gold appears only on CTAs, the divider, and interactive highlights
Motion as metaphor: animated route lines and pulsing port dots reflect cargo in transit
Sharp geometry: 2px radius on interactive elements; no rounded softness

rules.name: The Beacon Rule
rules.body: Cargo Gold appears on ≤10% of any surface. Its rarity is what makes it a signal.

rules.name: The No-Warm-Background Rule
rules.body: Cargo Gold is never used as a background fill on any block larger than a button.

rules.name: The Two-Family Rule
rules.body: Bebas Neue for display only; Barlow for everything else. Never a third typeface.

rules.name: The Uppercase Discipline Rule
rules.body: Body copy and prose are NOT uppercase. Only labels and Bebas Neue display are uppercase.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. The button hover glow is the only permitted shadow.

dos: Do keep Cargo Gold rare — headline em highlight, divider, CTA button, link hovers only
Do use Bebas Neue only for hero display text (≥2rem)
Do keep the dark background as the dominant surface
Do pair motion with meaning — route lines move because cargo moves
Do apply text-wrap: balance to all Bebas Neue headlines
Do include @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) that stops animations while keeping elements visible
donts: Don't use generic logistics imagery: stock-photo trucks, container ship clip-art
Don't use startup-pastel SaaS aesthetics: no purple gradients, no rounded pill cards, no feature grids
Don't use heavy corporate portal design: no dense forms, no government-portal typography
Don't apply border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or callouts
Don't use background-clip: text gradient fills on any text
Don't add rounded corners beyond 2px on buttons or inputs
Don't use uppercase tracking on prose body copy
Don't add box-shadow at element rest state
